commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: Test Failover for 2.10.3 RC1
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: Test Failover for 2.10.3 RC1

Testing failover with ZFS/SPL 0.7.3 instead instead of ZFS/SPL 0.7.5

Testing 2.10.3RC1 with older ZFS

Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs envdefinitions="SLOW=yes" clientcount=4 osscount=2 mdscount=2 mdtfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 clientarch=x86_64 ossarch=x86_64 mdsarch=x86_64 austeroptions=-R failover=true iscsi=1 testlist=replay-vbr
Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs envdefinitions="SLOW=yes" clientcount=4 osscount=2 mdscount=2 mdtfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 clientarch=x86_64 ossarch=x86_64 mdsarch=x86_64 austeroptions=-R failover=true iscsi=1 testlist=replay-dual,replay-vbr
